breakdown: This PR refactors the rewards box normalization to use a centralized robust numeric converter with fallback chains for handling messy LLM outputs. A new internal helper `_get_raw` handles edge cases (0, NaN, inf, empty strings) before conversion. The test file is substantial but lacks explicit assertion statements—errors are collected in a list rather than raised. Type hints use Any appropriately for the fallback function. Good use of explanatory comments for WHY certain checks are needed.
key_changes: Added `_get_raw` helper function with fallback key list and edge case handling (0, NaN, inf, empty)
Replaced multiple `coerce_int` calls with centralized `_DNC.convert_value` using fallback key chains
Added robust handling for absent `next_level_xp` to default to 0 instead of DNC game-state defaults
Created new E2E test `test_rewards_box_robustness.py` validating conversion on messy LLM payloads
Added unit tests covering fallback aliases, empty primary fallbacks, and NaN cases
